evidence: packages/btd/src/ancestry.ts defines BtdAncestorEdgeInput, BtdAncestorEdge, BtdAncestorGraphEdge, review receipts, status, risk flags, source fingerprint, claimant/reviewer ids, and route weight

supabase/migrations/002_v27_btd_crypto_registry.sql defines btd_ancestor_edges with review_id, evidence roots, source_fingerprint_root, claimant_id, reviewer_id, risk_flags, status, route_weight, conflict disclosure, receipt, and issued_at
protocol-demonstration/src/receipt-schemas.js requires ancestry review counts, supplyEffect, mintCountDelta, and edges in the demonstration receipt family
packages/btd/src/ancestry.ts rejects edges with createdAfterChildFit !== true as not_late_bound
supabase/migrations/002_v27_btd_crypto_registry.sql permits non-late-bound rows only when the row is rejected, preventing payable pre-fit ancestry
packages/btd/__tests__/v27-crypto-primitives.test.ts proves pre-fit ancestry is rejected
packages/btd/src/ancestry.ts stamps each review receipt and each reviewed edge with supplyEffect: 'none' and mintCountDelta: 0
supabase/migrations/002_v27_btd_crypto_registry.sql has btd_ancestor_edges_non_supply requiring supply_effect = 'none' and mint_count_delta = 0
package, API, and demonstration tests assert ancestry review receipts and edges keep zero mint-count delta
packages/btd/src/ancestry.ts marks confidence_below_threshold edges as recorded_unpaid with routeWeight 0
citation-only edges are recorded_unpaid unless explicitly admitted by review configuration
disclosed-conflict edges are recorded_unpaid until independent review clears them
packages/btd/src/ancestry.ts rejects reciprocal loops and broader dependency cycles against the supplied graph
packages/btd/src/ancestry.ts rejects duplicate edge keys, duplicate source fingerprint roots, self edges, child mismatches, pre-fit claims, and claimant/reviewer conflicts
packages/btd/__tests__/v27-crypto-primitives.test.ts, packages/api/src/routes/__tests__/btd-crypto.test.ts, and protocol-demonstration/test/v27-crypto-primitives.test.js cover the attack paths

closureCriteria.criterion: ancestry is optional for base BTD validity
evidence: packages/btd/src/ancestry.ts is independent of supply, range, measureminting, and mint receipt modules
buildBtdAncestryReviewSettlement returns a standalone settlement review with a Terminal journal entry and optional registry write
no mint admission path requires ancestry review to create a valid base BTD range

closureCriteria.criterion: commercial API route is unversioned and commit-gated
evidence: packages/api/src/routes/btd-crypto.ts exposes /btd/ancestry-review and buildBtdAncestryReviewSettlement
uapi/app/api/btd/ancestry-review/route.ts binds the Next.js App Router endpoint without creating a versioned route prefix
registry writes occur only when commitToRegistry is explicitly true

validatedCommands.notes: Jest reports pre-existing duplicate manual mock warnings outside the V27 package slice.
Jest reports pre-existing duplicate manual mock warnings outside the V27 API slice.
Jest reports an existing ts-jest globals deprecation warning.

nonPromotionAssertions: BITCODE_SPEC.txt remained V26 until Gate 16 promotion
BITCODE_SPEC_V27_PROVEN.md did not exist until Gate 16 promotion
Gate 9 closure does not claim live graph-anomaly telemetry, live revenue-route consumption of ancestor payouts, generated V27 proof-family closure, or V27 promotion
All BTD API route paths remain unversioned
